title: Kinemon’s Wano Mission
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on kinemon’s wano mission within the The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now, then... from now till our fight with Kaidou,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We all have a great many things to do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We must not over- look the slightest detail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As I told you earlier, we are at the moment...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Gathering Samurai to join us in our fight in Wano itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He may be able to help us increase our strength quite considerably.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As such, there is a certain man we are trying to meet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Former First Division Commander of the Whitebeard Pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Marco the Phoenix!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Marco!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right! You guys must be friends, huh! Is he gonna join us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But... didn't he, a year ago, after that incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, yes. Don't get your hopes up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Even if we manage to find him, our chances are slim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that name sounds so familiar... Marco... who...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He sort of looks like a pine- apple.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh! That guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The remnants of Whitebeard's crew, led by Marco...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Clashed with teach's Blackbeard Pirates in a Ferocious Battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been a year since the "Payback war," as that skirmish has come to be known.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: since it ended, the captains of Whitebeard's crew have all but vanished.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If indeed he still lives,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have a bit of an idea where our friend Marco might be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oi, ol, Oi! So Marco and the others fought with Blackbeard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's right. Both sides brought their full forces ...it was quite a large-scale affair.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: unfortu- lately, Marco suffered an overwhelming defeat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It was only after that war that blackbeard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: began to be acknowledged among the names of the yonkou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So that's how it went down, eh?! That damn blackbeard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This was huge news! Where were you, under a rock?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I heard that after I lost consciousness during the summit war,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The remaining whitebeard pirates saved my life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Jinbei! Take ace's little brother with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I wanna see 'em again so I can say thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As you can probably tell, we need time for all of this to be done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That makes sense. Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I guess we'll be splitting up here! We've gotta pick a place to meet up again!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We will return to Wano! We must increase our allies and begin preparations.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Will you be okay going back? You're being targeted by the Shogun, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I am most worried about the safety of my comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: With our submarine, we at least don't have to worry about being found out during our voyage. All that remains is securing a safe haven on the island itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I will leave with my underlings in search of Marco.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Let us meet on Wano. We'll need to make a Vivre card for Kinemon.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: There he is! It's Raizo- Dono!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shuffle

summary: Kinemon’s Wano Mission: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
